description_long: This is a luxurious, modern recliner chair with a matching ottoman, both upholstered in a rich, tan leather material. The chair features a high, segmented backrest with a prominent, padded headrest and deep button tufting for added comfort and style. The armrests are wide, gently curved, and padded, seamlessly integrated into the chair's form. Both the chair and ottoman rest on sturdy, black, five-point swivel bases, providing stability and ease of movement. The set is placed on a dark, interlocking wooden floor mat, which contrasts elegantly with the warm leather. Metal accents are visible on the backrest, adding a touch of sophistication to the overall design.
description: A tan leather recliner with a matching ottoman, featuring deep tufting, padded armrests, and black swivel bases, set on a dark wooden mat.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full face of the recliner, tufted backrest, padded armrests, and ottoman directly in front.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the recliner's profile, thick cushioning, and the relationship between the chair and ottoman.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the segmented backrest, metal support accents, and the back of the swivel base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, with clear visibility of the chair's depth and ottoman placement.
attribute_armrest_design: The armrests are wide, gently curved, and fully padded with the same tan leather as the rest of the chair, seamlessly integrated into the chair's body for a unified look.
attribute_backrest_segmentation: The backrest is divided into two main sections: a large, padded headrest and a lower, tufted lumbar section, providing ergonomic support.
